parameters.name: body
parameters.value:
={{ 'Weekly Operations Report

Period: ' + $json.period + '

Agents Active: ' + $json.executive_summary.agents_active + '
Tasks Processed: ' + $json.executive_summary.total_tasks_processed + '
Success Rate: ' + $json.executive_summary.avg_success_rate + '%
Workflow Executions: ' + $json.executive_summary.workflow_executions + '
Incidents: ' + $json.executive_summary.incidents_total + ' (' + $json.executive_summary.incidents_critical + ' critical)
Uptime: ' + $json.executive_summary.uptime_pct + '%' }}
